text.title: User Interviews Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) that pins the shape of a valid user-interview artefact. Subagents validate against this before returning.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "interview-onboarding-2026-05-23", "owner": "Maria Yuskiv <maria@faion.net>", "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23", "transcripts_sanitised": true, "segments": [{"name": "first-time buyer", "n": 6}], "research_questions": ["What blocks completion?", "Where do users hesitate?", "What language do users use?", "What expectations carry over from competitors?", "Where do users seek help?"], "guide": {"questions": ["Walk me through the last time you tried to onboard a new app.", "What were you trying to accomplish?", "Tell me what you remembered most."], "neutrality_reviewed": true}, "insights": [{ "statement": "First-time buyers expect a single-screen review before final confirmation.", "evidence": [{"participant_id": "P3", "quote": "I wanted one place to see everything before I press the button."}] }] }

{ "owner": "we", "transcripts_sanitised": false, "segments": [{"name": "users", "n": 6}], "research_questions": ["What blocks completion?"], "guide": {"questions": ["Would you click here if it was blue?"], "neutrality_reviewed": false}, "insights": [{"statement": "users want it easier"}] }
example.note: Owner plural; transcripts not sanitised; research_questions below minItems; guide leading + not neutrality reviewed; insight has no evidence.

forbidden.pattern: Artefact with `guide.neutrality_reviewed == false` AND insights present.
`transcripts_sanitised == false` when insights cite quotes (PII risk).
